context: Synthetic example. Demonstrates that the instrument can CLASSIFY: survivability proof substituting for operating proof reads C / Circular without any claim of wrongdoing.

sources.title: Industry ranking award listing
sources.publisher: Conference run by lead investor's foundation

claims.statement: No disclosed competed program of record; one sole-source micro-pilot referenced.
Private layer retains the model, semantics, and operating workflows.
Cited legitimacy is a ranking sponsored by the lead investor's foundation.
Leads with deployments language; no performance data against a baseline.

seams.reason: Valuation and raise dwarf any disclosed competed award. The gap is the story.
Contracts framed as coming; details withheld.
Leads with raises and investor names, not performance.
Ranking graded and sponsored by the capital side.
Only a sole-source micro-pilot referenced; no competed program of record sourced.
Remove the capital narrative and press; little independently survives in the record.
Private layer keeps the model and semantics; nothing reproducible survives removal.

components.reason: Recurring consortium and its vehicles supply most of the capital.
Cited ranking is funded and graded by the lead investor's foundation.
Competed external demand is thin against $220M cumulative capital.
Backers, board, and validator recur across each other.

verdictNotes.rationale: Survivability proof (capital, valuation, a sponsored ranking) stands in for operating proof. No competed program of record and no independently verified performance against a baseline. This is a structural read, not an allegation of wrongdoing.
verdictNotes.largestGap: $220M cumulative capital against zero disclosed competed awards.
verdictNotes.whatWouldClearIt: A named, dated, competed program of record with independently verified performance against a stated baseline would move this toward A.
verdictNotes.rootsBeliefSupplier: Lead investor's foundation and the recurring consortium.
verdictNotes.rootsValueRetainer: Private operating layer retains the model, semantics, and exit rights.
